title: LDSG - Modded
description: Official Modpack for LDSGamers Modded Minecraft Server
body:
Official Modpack for the LDSGamers Community Modded Minecraft Server! 

***

Built on Forge 1.20.1, this pack is crafted for adventure, creativity, and community. Explore a world enhanced with quality-of-life mods, performance tweaks, building tools, and immersive gameplay—perfect for both casual builders and hardcore survivalists. Whether you’re creating massive kingdoms, running shops, or embarking on cooperative quests, this modpack offers a smooth, balanced experience designed to bring players together. Join, build, and thrive in the ultimate LDSGamers world!

***

Key Mods include: 
Create (+ addons, e.g. Steam n Rails, Central Kitchen)
Tom's Simple Storage
Biomes O' Plenty
Dynamic Trees
End Remastered
Incendium
Aether
Botany Pots
Gravestones
Waystones
Inventorio

And many more!

***

Discord: discord.gg/ldsg
LDSGamers' Code of Conduct: https://ldsgamers.com/code-of-conduct
